untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Estimated Fundamental Value' which is not a market-observable indicator in the allowed list. Position sizing based on 'uncertainty in valuation estimate' (0.85 confidence threshold) and 'valuation estimate changes materially (>10%)' cannot be operationalized without a fundamental value calculation model external to the backtest engine. These require exogenous valuation inputs (DCF, P/E multiples, etc.) not available in the price/technical indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to map discount_threshold (0.15) and convergence target (5%) to price ratios, but this is a placeholder approximation. The core signal is untranslatable without a fundamental value oracle. The signal ID suggests this is a mean-reversion / value investing strategy requiring external fundamental data.
